text_block_list.text: One day in the academy hallway...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That should be all of it.

Air Groove appears to be deep in<n>thought as she
stares at a pile of<n>cardboard boxes in the corner
of the<n>hallway.
choice_data_list: What's with all these cardboard boxes?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do not even think of approaching me<n>with such
imprudence. I shall put<n>these boxes away
myself. Your<n>concern is not required.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
An accumulation of superfluous<n>notices, returned
loan umbrellas, and<n>damaged academy
equipment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As part of the student council, I will<n>re-sort these
items in another room.
choice_data_list: Will you be all right carrying all that by yourself?
Will you be all right carrying all that by yourself?

You'd better hurry if you want to get through all
of that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As part of the student council, I will<n>re-sort these
items in another room.
choice_data_list: Will you be all right carrying all that by yourself?
Will you be all right carrying all that by yourself?

You'd better hurry if you want to get through all
of that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Are you attempting to express<n>concern for
me? This poses no<n>challenge to one who trains
on a daily<n>basis.

Air Groove picks up the pile of<n>cardboard boxes
like a bag of<n>feathers and walks away.

It is evident by how steady her steps<n>are that
she has trained every inch of<n>her body.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. If I cannot handle this trifling<n>pile in a
timely manner...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then I do not deserve to show my<n>face to others
as the Empress or the<n>vice president of the
school council.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Enough pointless chatter. I'm sure<n>you have
more important things to do<n>than concern
yourself with me. Be off,<n>then.

Air Groove picks up the pile of<n>cardboard boxes
like a bag of<n>feathers and walks away.

She doesn't waste a single<n>movement as she
carries the large<n>boxes, attesting to the
thoroughness<n>she applies to everyday life.
